subject: biology
title: 21N.1.SL.TZ0.25
question_html:
What occurs as a result of a cut in the skin of a finger?

A. Prothrombin is transformed into thrombin.

B. Fibrin is converted to insoluble fibrinogen.

C. Platelets produce antibodies to prevent infection.

D. Clotting factors are released from red blood cells.
examiners_html: A high discrimination index and fewer than 30 % of candidates answering correctly show that only best-prepared candidates had studied this topic carefully enough.
